answer:
Archy was alerted to Lenny's double-dealing when Handsome Bob gave him legal documents revealing the informant pseudonym "Sydney Shaw," which Archy recognized as belonging to Lenny. This showed that Lenny had been secretly working with the police to imprison his own associates, including Archy, to boost his own power. Consequently, Archy turned on Lenny, ordering his death. 

\boxed{\text{Handsome Bob gave Archy legal documents showing the informant pseudonym "Sydney Shaw" belonged to Lenny.}}
